title: POST /todos accepts empty title
body: The todos route creates a todo even when title is missing, producing blank entries. Validate the body.

title: Error handler leaks stack traces
body: errorHandler returns err.stack to clients, exposing internals in production. Only include stack in development.

title: No endpoint to toggle completion
body: todoStore has toggle() but no route exposes it. Add PATCH /todos/:id/toggle.

title: DELETE with non-numeric id returns 204
body: Number('abc') is NaN and delete returns false, but the route still sometimes returns 204. Validate id parsing.

title: List endpoint has no pagination
body: GET /todos returns everything. Add limit/offset query params backed by the store.

title: Server does not handle JSON parse errors
body: Malformed JSON bodies bubble up as unhandled errors. Ensure express.json errors hit the error handler cleanly.

title: Port not validated
body: server.js uses process.env.PORT directly; a non-numeric value should fall back to 3000 with a warning.
